decisions.question: CLI entry point and exec handoff: how does the user invoke auto-install (tsuku run vs alternatives), how does tsuku hand off to the command preserving exit code, and what surface is exposed so #2168 can call the install core as a library function?
decisions.chosen: tsuku run cobra subcommand with core logic in internal/autoinstall/

decisions.question: Mode resolution order and non-interactive fallback: what is the priority chain for resolving suggest/confirm/auto mode (flag vs env var vs config vs default), how is TTY detection performed, and what does confirm mode do when stdin is not a TTY (error-out vs silent fallback to suggest vs silent fallback to auto)?
decisions.chosen: Flag > TSUKU_AUTO_INSTALL_MODE env var > auto_install_mode config > default confirm; error-out on non-TTY confirm

decisions.question: Auto-install core API and shared interface boundary: where does the install-then-exec logic live as a library function callable by both tsuku run (#1679) and tsuku exec (#2168), and where does the ProjectVersionResolver interface live so both consumers share the same type without duplication?
